ST. CLAIRE STREET IN TICONDEROGA IS FLOODED AND IMPASSABLE. CELLARS ARE BEGINNING TO FLOOD WITH EMERGENCY RESPONDERS WORKING TO PUMP OUT WATER. MULTIPLE OBSERVATIONS SITES SHOW 2-3 INCHES OF RAIN FELL IN THE PAST 2-3 HOURS. IN ADDITION, SEVERAL CULVERTS BETWEEN SHROON LAKE AND RICONDEROGA HAVE BEEN WASHED OUT.
